entities.name: MultiByteToWideChar
entities.description: Converts a character string from a multibyte character set to a wide character (UTF-16) string. When used with WideCharToMultiByte function and Codepage parameter set to 28591, it maps between ANSI and UTF-16LE characters.

entities.name: WideCharToMultiByte
entities.description: Converts a wide character string to a multibyte character string. When Codepage parameter is set to 28591, maps between ANSI and UTF-16LE characters. Like all other aspects of WinINet API, this function cannot be safely called from DllMain or global object constructors/destructors.

entities.name: HTTP_VERSION_INFO
entities.description: Contains HTTP version information.
entities.remarks: 在 Windows 7、Windows Server 2008 R2 及更高版本上， HTTP_VERSION_INFO 结构中的值被 Internet Explorer 设置覆盖。 EnableHttp1_1 是 HKLM\Software\Microsoft\InternetExplorer\AdvacnedOptions\HTTP\GENABLE 下的注册表值，由 Internet Explorer 中为系统设置的 Internet 选项控制。 EnableHttp1_1值默认 为 1。 如果 EnableHttp1_1 设置为 1，则对于任何低于 1.1 的 HTTP 版本 ，将忽略 HTTP_VERSION_INFO 结构。 注意 WinINet 不支持服务器实现。 此外，不应从服务使用它。 对于服务器实现或服 务，请使用 Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP) 。

entities.name: URL_COMPONENTS
entities.description: Contains the components of a URL. When buffers are provided in this structure, escaped sequences (%xx) are converted to their corresponding characters.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 所需组件由 URL_COMPONENTS 结构的成员指示。 每个组件都有一个指向该值的指针，并具有存储存储值的长度的成员。 如果组件的值和长度都等于零，则不会返回该组件。 Windows Vista 及更高版本。如果指向组件的值的指针 NULL 且其相应长度成员的值不为零，则 lpszUrl 字符串中相应组件的第一个字符的地址存储在指针中，并且组件长度存储在长度成员中。 如果指针包含用户提供的缓冲区的地址，长度成员必须包含缓冲区的大小。

entities.name: CreateMD5SSOHash
entities.description: CreateMD5SSOHash 函数 (winineti.h) 获取指定帐户或领域的默认 Microsoft Passport 密码，从中创建 MD5 哈希，并返回结果。

parameters.name: pszChallengeInfo
parameters.description: 指向要用于 MD5 哈希的宽字符质询字符串的指针。[in] pwszRealm 指向一个字符串的指针，该字符串命名要为其获取密码的领域。 除非 pwszTarget 为 NULL，否则将忽略此参数。 如果 pwszTarget 和 pwszRealm 均为 NULL，则使用默认领域。

parameters.name: pwszTarget
parameters.description: 指向一个字符串的指针，该字符串命名要获取其密码的帐户。 如果 pwszTarget 为 NULL，则使用 pwszRealm 指示的领域。[out] pbHexHash 指向以十六进制字符串格式返回 MD5 哈希的输出缓冲区的指针。 此缓冲区的长度必须至 少为 33 个字节。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE ，否则返回 FALSE 。

entities.remarks: 一旦 CreateMD5SSOHash 函数成功获取指定帐户或领域的 Microsoft Passport 密码，它将质询字符串和密码从宽字符转换为多字节 (通常为 8 位) 字符，连接它们，并使用 RSA 库从生成的密钥生成 MD5 哈希。 然后，它将哈希转换为以 null 结尾的 8 位十六进制数字字符串， (使用小写字母) 放置在 pbHexHash 参数指向的缓冲区中。 因此， pbHexHash 指向的输出缓冲区必须足够长，以便为哈希的 16 个字节中的每个字节接受两个字节，外加一个终止 null 字符，总共为 33 个字节。 与 WinINet API 的所有其他方面一样，无法从 DllMain 或全局对象的构造函数和析构函数中安全地调用此函数。 注意 WinINet 不支持服务器实现。 此外，不应从服务使用它。 对于服务器实现或服 务，请使用 Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP) 。

entities.name: CreateUrlCacheContainerW

BOOL CreateUrlCacheContainerW(   [in]           LPCWSTR Name,

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: 要提供给缓存的名称。[in] lpCachePrefix 要基于缓存的缓存前缀。

parameters.name: lpszCachePath
parameters.description: 要在其中创建缓存的缓存前缀。[in] KBCacheLimit 对于默认大小，缓存的大小限制（以整 KB 为单位）或 0。

parameters.name: dwContainerType
parameters.description: 要基于缓存的容器类型。[in] dwOptions 此参数是保留的，必须为 0。 pvBuffer 此参数是保留的，必须 NULL。[in, out] cbBuffer 此参数是保留的，必须 NULL。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 应用程序应使用 FtpGetCurrentDirectory 来确定远程站点的当前工作目录，而不是假设远程系统使用目录的分层命名方案。 lpszDirectory 参数可以是相对于当前目录的部分或完全限定的文件名。 与 WinINet API 的其他所有方面一样，不能从 DllMain 或全局对象的构造函数和析构函数中安全地调用此函数。 注意 WinINet 不支持服务器实现。 此外，不应从服务使用它。 对于服务器实现或服 务，请使用 Microsoft Windows HTTP 服务（WinHTTP）。 ７ 备注

parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，用于接收请求的信息。 此参数不得 NULL。[in, out] lpdwBufferLength 指向一个变量的指针，其中包含 lpvBuffer指向的缓冲区的大小（以字节为单位）。 当函数成功返回时，此变量包含写入缓冲区的信息字节数。 对于字符串，字节计数不包 括字符串的终止 null 字符。函数何时 失败并显示 ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER的扩展错误代码，lpdwBufferLength 所指向的变量包含的缓冲区的大小（以字节为单位）的大小，足以接收请求的信息。 然后，调用应用程序可以分配此大小的缓冲区或更大的缓冲区，然后再次调用该函数。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.name: InternetAttemptConnect

entities.syntax:
DWORD InternetAttemptConnect(
[in] DWORD dwReserved);

parameters.name: dwReserved

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回ERROR_SUCCESS，否则返回 系统错误代码 。

entities.remarks: 此函数允许应用程序在发出任何请求之前先尝试连接。 客户端程序可以使用此来唤起拨号对话框。 如果尝试失败，应用程序应进入脱机模式。 与 WinINet API 的所有其他方面一样，无法从 DllMain 或全局对象的构造函数和析构函数中安全地调用此函数。 注意 WinINet 不支持服务器实现。 此外，不应从服务使用它。 对于服务器实现或服 务，请使用 Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP) 。

entities.description: Checks whether a connection to the Internet can be established. This function is deprecated - use NetworkInformation.GetInternetConnectionProfile or NLM interfaces instead.
entities.syntax:
BOOL InternetCheckConnectionW(
[in] LPCWSTR lpszUrl,   [in] DWORD   dwFlags,   [in] DWORD   dwReserved);

parameters.name: lpszUrl
parameters.description: 指向 null终止字符串的指针，该字符串指定要用于检查连接的 URL。 此值可以 NULL。[in] dwFlags 选项。 FLAG_ICC_FORCE_CONNECTION是当前唯一可用的标志。 如果设置了此标志，它将强制建立连接。 按以下顺序尝试套接字连接： 如果 lpszUrl 为非NULL，则会从中提取主机值，用于 ping 该特定主机。 如果 lpszUrlNULL，并且最近的服务器的内部服务器数据库中有一个条目，则会从该条目中提取主机值，用于 ping 该服务器。

parameters.name: dwReserved
parameters.description: 此参数是保留的，必须为 0。

return_value.description: 如果连接成功或 FALSE，则返回 TRUE。 使用 GetLastError 检索错误代码。 如果无法建立连接或套接字数据库无条件脱机，则 ERROR_NOT_CONNECTED getLastError 返回 ERROR_NOT_CONNECTED。

entities.remarks: InternetCheckConnection is deprecated. It doesn't work in environments using web proxy servers to access the Internet. Use NetworkInformation.GetInternetConnectionProfile or NLM interfaces instead. Note: WinINet doesn't support server implementations and shouldn't be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE ，否则返回 FALSE 。 要获得更多的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

parameters.name: lpszUrlName

entities.name: INTERNET_FLAG_NO_CACHE_WRITE
entities.description: Specifies that the resource should be downloaded from the server and not from the cache.

entities.name: INTERNET_FLAG_RESYNCHRONIZE
entities.description: If the Expires time and LastModified time from the server are not present, forces a reload to determine whether to reload the item from the network. Causes temporary files to be created if the file cannot be cached. Forces downloading of the requested file, object, or directory listing from the origin server, not from the cache. Reloads HTTP resources if the resource has been modified since the last download. Reloads all FTP resources. Windows XP and Windows Server 2003 R2 and earlier: Also reloads Gopher resources.

entities.remarks: Calling FtpOpenFile will cause all other calls to FTP functions on the same FTP session handle to fail with ERROR_FTP_TRANSFER_IN_PROGRESS until InternetCloseHandle is called. The application must close the HINTERNET handle returned by FtpOpenFile using InternetCloseHandle. Only one file can be opened in a single FTP session. Note that WinINet does not support server implementations. Also, it should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: FtpFindFirstFile

Note that only one FtpFindFirstFile operation can be active per FTP session handle due to FTP protocol limitations. If called again before closing the handle with InternetCloseHandle, it fails with ERROR_FTP_TRANSFER_IN_PROGRESS. The returned HINTERNET handle must be closed when no longer needed.

entities.name: InternetFindNextFile
entities.description: Retrieves the next file in a directory listing started by FtpFindFirstFile. Applications must not call FtpFindFirstFile, FtpOpenFile, and InternetCloseHandle from within this function. Like all other aspects of the WinINet API, this function cannot be safely called from DllMain or the constructors and destructors of global objects. Note: WinINet does not support server implementations. Also, it should not be used from a service. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: FtpGetFile
entities.description: Retrieves a file from the FTP server and stores it under the specified file name. This is a high-level routine that handles all the overhead and bookkeeping associated with reading a file from an FTP server and storing it locally. Applications that require only file data retrieval or need close control over the file transfer should use FtpOpenFile and InternetReadFile instead. If the dwFlags parameter specifies FTP_TRANSFER_TYPE_ASCII, file data is converted translating control and formatting characters to local equivalents. The default transfer is in binary mode, where the file is downloaded in the same format as it is stored on the server. The lpszRemoteFile and lpszNewFile parameters can be either partially or fully qualified file names relative to the current directory.

parameters.description: 指向 null-terminated 字符串的指针，该字符串包含主机的名称或点小数 IP 地址（如 198.105.232.1）。[in] nServerPort lpszHost Gopher 服务器的端口号，按主机字节顺序运行。 如果 nServerPortINTERNET_INVALID_PORT_NUMBER，则使用默认 Gopher 端口。[in] lpszDisplayString 指向 null终止字符串的指针，其中包含要显示的 Gopher 文档或目录。 如果此参数 NULL，则该函数将返回 Gopher 服务器的默认目录。[in] lpszSelectorString 指向要发送到 Gopher 服务器的选择器字符串的指针，以便检索信息。 此参数可以 NULL。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError 或 InternetGetLastResponseInfo。

parameters.name: hRequest
parameters.description: 调用 HttpOpenRequest 函数返回的句柄。[in] lpszHeaders 指向包含要追加到请求的标头的字符串变量的指针。 每个标头都必须由 CR/LF（回车符/ 换行符）对终止。[in] dwHeadersLength TCHA中 lpszHeaders的大小。 如果此参数为 -1L，则函数假定 lpszHeaders 为零终止 （ASCIIZ），并计算长度。[in] dwModifiers 一组控制此函数语义的修饰符。 此参数可以是以下值的组合。 价值 意义

entities.name: HTTP_ADDREQ_FLAG_ADD

entities.name: HTTP_ADDREQ_FLAG_ADD_IF_NEW

entities.name: HTTP_ADDREQ_FLAG_REPLACE
entities.description: Specifies that if the header does not exist, it should be added. When used with HTTP_ADDREQ_FLAG_REPLACE, it replaces or removes the header. If the header value is empty and the header is found, it will be removed. If not empty, the header value is replaced.

entities.name: HttpAddRequestHeaders
entities.description: Appends additional free-form headers to an HTTP request handle. This function is designed for complex clients requiring detailed control over requests sent to HTTP servers. Multiple headers can be passed in a single buffer for basic operations. When attempting to remove or replace headers, only one header can be specified in lpszHeaders. Note: HttpAddRequestHeadersA represents headers as ISO-8859-1 characters, while HttpAddRequestHeadersW converts them to UTF-16LE.

entities.name: HttpAddRequestHeadersW

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，该函数将返回 true。 如果该函数失败，则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 如果 lpBuffersOut 未设置为 NULL，HttpEndRequest 将返回 ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER。与 WinINet API 的其他所有方面一样，不能从 DllMain 或全局对象的构造函数和析构函数中安全地调用此函数。注意 WinINet 不支持服务器实现。此外，不应从服务使用它。对于服务器实现或服务，请使用 Microsoft Windows HTTP 服务（WinHTTP）。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 HTTP 请求句柄，否则 NULL。 若要检索扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.name: HttpOpenRequest
entities.description: Creates a new HTTP request handle and stores specified parameters in it. The HTTP request handle contains the request to be sent to the HTTP server along with all RFC822/MIME/HTTP headers. Automatically sets INTERNET_FLAG_NO_CACHE_WRITE and INTERNET_FLAG_RELOAD flags for non-GET/POST verbs. In Internet Explorer 5+, Content-Length headers are ignored for HEAD requests on HTTP/1.1 servers.

entities.name: InternetSetStatusCallback
entities.description: Sets a status callback function for WinINet operations. Note that changing the callback function on a handle does not change the callback on derived handles (e.g., handles returned by InternetConnect). The callback function must be changed at each level. Many WinINet functions perform multiple operations on the network, which may take time to complete and could fail. The status callback function can display status information during long operations. The callback function cannot be removed while any callback or asynchronous function is pending. After calling InternetSetStatusCallback, the callback function can be accessed from any WinINet function to monitor lengthy network operations. Note: When dwContext parameter of HttpOpenRequest is set to zero (INTERNET_NO_CALLBACK), or when InternetConnect's dwContext handle is set to zero (INTERNET_NO_CALLBACK), the callback function specified in lpfnInternetCallback parameter will not be called for asynchronous operations on the request handle. Like all other aspects of WinINet API, this function cannot be safely called from DllMain or global object constructors/destructors. Note: WinINet does not support server implementations and should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: HttpOpenRequestW
entities.description: Creates an HTTP request handle for sending requests to an HTTP server.

);

entities.name: HttpQueryInfo
entities.description: Retrieves header information associated with an HTTP request. HttpQueryInfoA handles ISO-8859-1 characters while HttpQueryInfoW converts ISO-8859-1 to UTF-16LE. For non-ASCII characters, applications should use MultiByteToWideChar/WideCharToMultiByte with codepage 28591.

entities.name: HttpQueryInfoW
entities.description: 检索与 HTTP 请求关联的标头信息。
entities.syntax:
BOOL HttpQueryInfoW(
  [in] HINTERNET hRequest,
  [in] DWORD dwInfoLevel,
  [in, out] LPVOID lpBuffer,
  [in, out] LPDWORD lpdwBufferLength,
  [in, out] LPDWORD lpdwIndex
);

parameters.name: hRequest
parameters.description: 调用 HttpOpenRequest 或 InternetOpenUrl 函数返回的句柄。[in] dwInfoLevel 要检索的属性和修改请求的标志的组合。 有关可能的属性和修饰符值的列表，请参阅 查询信息标志。

parameters.name: lpBuffer
parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，用于接收请求的信息。 此参数不得 NULL。[in, out] lpdwBufferLength 指向一个变量的指针，其中包含 lpvBuffer指向的缓冲区的大小（以字节为单位）。 当函数成功返回时，此变量包含写入缓冲区的信息字节数。 对于字符串，字节计数不包 括字符串的终止 null 字符。函数何时 失败并显示 ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER的扩展错误代码，lpdwBufferLength 所指向的变量包含的缓冲区的大小（以字节为单位）的大小，足以接收请求的信息。 然后，调用应用程序可以分配此大小的缓冲区或更大的缓冲区，然后再次调用该函数。

parameters.name: lpdwIndex
parameters.description: 指向从零开始的标头索引的指针，用于枚举具有相同名称的多个标头。 调用函数时，此参数是要返回的指定标头的索引。 函数返回时，此参数是下一个标头的索引。 如果找不 到下一个索引，则返回 ERROR_HTTP_HEADER_NOT_FOUND。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 可以从 HttpQueryInfo检索以下类型的数据： 字符串 （默认值） SYSTEMTIME（日期） DWORD（对于 STATUS_CODE、CONTENT_LENGTH等，如果使用 HTTP_QUERY_FLAG_NUMBER） 如果应用程序要求将数据作为字符串以外的数据类型返回，则必须将相应的修饰符包含在传递给 dwInfoLevel的属性。

entities.name: HttpSendRequestA
entities.description: 将指定的请求发送到HTTP服务器，允许调用方发送超出通常传递给HttpSendRequestEx的额外数据。
entities.syntax:
BOOL HttpSendRequestA(
[in] HINTERNET hRequest,
[in] LPCSTR    lpszHeaders,
[in] DWORD     dwHeadersLength,   [in] LPVOID    lpOptional,
[in] DWORD     dwOptionalLength);

parameters.name: hRequest
parameters.description: 调用 HttpOpenRequest 函数返回的句柄。[in] lpszHeaders 指向 null-terminated 字符串的指针，其中包含要追加到请求的其他标头。 如果没有附加 标头，则可以 NULL 此参数。[in] dwHeadersLength 其他标头的大小，TCHAR。 如果此参数 -1L，并且 lpszHeaders 不 NULL，则该函数假定 lpszHeaders 为零终止 （ASCIIZ），并计算长度。 请参阅“说明”了解具体内容。[in] lpOptional 指向缓冲区的指针，其中包含请求标头之后要立即发送的任何可选数据。 此参数通常用于 POST 和 PUT 操作。 可选数据可以是要发布到服务器的资源或信息。 如果没有要发送 的可选数据，则可以 NULL 此参数。[in] dwOptionalLength 可选数据的大小（以字节为单位）。 如果没有要发送的可选数据，此参数可以为零。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.name: HttpSendRequest
entities.description: Sends the specified request to the HTTP server, allowing the client to specify additional headers and optional data to be sent immediately after the request headers. Commonly used for write operations like PUT and POST. Returns status code and response headers which can be queried using HttpQueryInfo. Has ANSI (HttpSendRequestA) and Unicode versions.

entities.name: HttpSendRequestEx
entities.description: Sends a request to an HTTP server and receives the response. Unlike HttpSendRequest, this function does not allow sending additional data beyond the single buffer passed to it. Applications needing to send extra data should use HttpSendRequest instead. After calling HttpSendRequestEx, remaining data can be sent via InternetWriteFile, followed by HttpEndRequest. Note: HttpSendRequestExA sends data as ISO-8859-1 characters rather than ANSI. HttpSendRequestExW sends data as UTF-16LE converted from ISO-8859-1, making it unsafe for headers containing non-ASCII characters.

entities.name: HttpSendRequestExW

entities.name: InternetCanonicalizeUrlA
entities.description: 规范化 URL，包括将不安全字符和空格转换为转义序列。

parameters.name: lpszUrl
parameters.description: 指向包含规范化的 URL 的字符串的指针。[out] lpszBuffer 指向接收生成的规范化 URL 的缓冲区的指针。[in, out] lpdwBufferLength 指向包含 lpszBuffer 缓冲区大小（以字符为单位）的变量的指针。 如果函数成功，此参数将接收实际复制到 lpszBuffer 缓冲区的字符数，该缓冲区不包括终止 null 字符。 如果函数失败，此参数将接收缓冲区所需的大小（以字符为单位），其中包括终止 null 字符。

parameters.name: dwFlags
parameters.description: 控制规范化。 如果未指定任何标志，该函数会将所有不安全字符和元序列（如 .，\ ..和...）转换为转义序列。 此参数可以是下列值之一。 价值

entities.name: ICU_BROWSER_MODE
entities.description: Specifies browser mode flag for URL normalization. Client applications that need to normalize entire URLs should use this.

entities.name: ICU_ENCODE_PERCENT
entities.description: Flag indicating that InternetCanonicalizeUrl should encode percent signs in URLs. Prevents double encoding of already escaped sequences.

entities.name: ICU_NO_ENCODE
entities.description: Specifies that URL encoding/decoding should not be performed on characters after '#' or '?', and trailing spaces after '?' will not be removed. If not specified, the entire URL is encoded and trailing spaces are removed.
entities.return_value: If successful, returns TRUE; otherwise returns FALSE. For extended error information, call GetLastError function.

parameters.name: dwFlags
parameters.description: 控制规范化。 如果未指定任何标志，该函数会将所有不安全字符和元序列（如 .，\ ..和...）转换为转义序列。 此参数可以是下列值之一。 价值

entities.name: InternetCheckConnectionA
entities.description: 允许应用程序检查是否可以建立与Internet的连接。此函数在后续版本中可能会更改或不可用，建议改用NetworkInformation.GetInternetConnectionProfile或NLM接口。
entities.syntax:
BOOL InternetCheckConnectionA(
[in] LPCSTR lpszUrl,   [in] DWORD  dwFlags,   [in] DWORD  dwReserved);

parameters.name: lpszUrl
parameters.description: 指向 null终止字符串的指针，该字符串指定要用于检查连接的 URL。 此值可以 NULL。[in] dwFlags 选项。 FLAG_ICC_FORCE_CONNECTION是当前唯一可用的标志。 如果设置了此标志，它将强制建立连接。 按以下顺序尝试套接字连接： 如果 lpszUrl 为非NULL，则会从中提取主机值，用于 ping 该特定主机。 如果 lpszUrlNULL，并且最近的服务器的内部服务器数据库中有一个条目，则会从该条目中提取主机值，用于 ping 该服务器。

parameters.name: dwReserved
parameters.description: 此参数是保留的，必须为 0。

return_value.description: 如果连接成功或 FALSE，则返回 TRUE。 使用 GetLastError 检索错误代码。 如果无法建立连接或套接字数据库无条件脱机，则 ERROR_NOT_CONNECTED getLastError 返回 ERROR_NOT_CONNECTED。

entities.remarks: 已弃用InternetCheckConnection。在使用Web代理服务器访问Internet的环境中不起作用。建议改用NetworkInformation.GetInternetConnectionProfile或NLM接口检查Internet访问。注意：WinINet不支持服务器实现，也不应从服务使用它。对于服务器实现或服务，请使用Microsoft Windows HTTP服务(WinHTTP)。

entities.name: InternetEnumPerSiteCookieDecision
entities.description: Enumerates per-site cookie decisions. Initially call with dwIndex set to 0. Increment dwIndex to traverse the list of sites and cookie settings. Returns FALSE with WinINet error ERROR_NO_MORE_ITEMS when reaching the end of the list. Like all WinINet API aspects, this function cannot be safely called from DllMain or global object constructors/destructors. Note: WinINet does not support server implementations and should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

return_value.description: Returns TRUE if cookie settings for a given domain were retrieved, FALSE otherwise.

entities.name: INTERNET_STATUS_HANDLE_CLOSING

entities.name: InternetCreateUrl
entities.description: Creates a URL from its component parts. The Unicode version will first attempt conversion using the system code page, falling back to UTF-8 if that fails. [in, out] lpdwUrlLength Pointer to a variable that specifies the size (in TCHARs) of the lpszUrl buffer. On return, receives the size of the URL string excluding the NULL terminator.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE;否则返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: When specifying the scheme in the URL_COMPONENTS structure passed to lpUrlComponents: if lpszScheme is not NULL, it will be used for the scheme. Note: WinINet does not support server implementations and should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: InternetDial
entities.description: Establishes a dial-up connection using WinINet. Note: Starting from Windows Vista and Windows Server 2008, WinINet dial functions use RAS functions to establish dial-up connections. WinINet supports functionality documented in RasDialDlg. Like all other aspects of WinINet API, this function cannot be safely called from DllMain or global object constructors/destructors. WinINet does not support server implementations and should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).
entities.syntax:
DWORD InternetDial(
[in]  HWND    hwndParent,
[in]  LPSTR   lpszConnectoid,   [in]  DWORD   dwFlags,

[in]  DWORD   dwReserved);

entities.name: InternetGetCookie
entities.description: Retrieves cookies for the specified URL. InternetGetCookie checks persistent cookies in the windows\\cookies directory with future expiration dates. It also searches memory for session cookies created in the same process (not written to files). Note: Does not return cookies marked as 'HttpOnly' by servers.
entities.syntax:
BOOL InternetGetCookieExA(
[in]                LPCSTR  lpszUrl,
[in]                LPCSTR  lpszCookieName,   [in, out, optional] LPSTR   lpszCookieData,
[in, out]           LPDWORD lpdwSize,   [in]                DWORD   dwFlags,   [in]                LPVOID  lpReserved);

parameters.name: lpszUrl

entities.name: InternetOpen
entities.description: InternetOpen is the first WinINet function called by an application. It tells the Internet DLL to initialize internal data structures and prepare for future calls from the application. When the application finishes using Internet functions, it should call InternetCloseHandle to release the handle and any associated resources. Applications can call InternetOpen any number of times, though a single call is usually sufficient. Applications may need separate behaviors defined for each InternetOpen instance, such as different proxy servers configured per instance. The HINTERNET handle returned by InternetOpen must be closed using InternetCloseHandle. Note: WinINet does not support server implementations and should not be used from services. For server implementations or services, use Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: RetrieveUrlCacheEntryFile
entities.description: Retrieves the cached file associated with a URL without performing URL parsing. URLs containing anchors (#) will not be found in cache even if the base resource is cached. For example, passing URL http://adatum.com/example.htm#sample will return ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND even if http://adatum.com/example.htm is cached. The retrieved file is locked by the caller and should be unlocked after use. Cache manager automatically unlocks files after intervals. Note this function's efficiency depends on cache implementation (e.g., may copy data to temporary files). Recommended only when needing filenames to launch applications.
